SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"
FROM customer AS c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM project AS p
    WHERE c.customerid = p.customerid AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM projectcontract AS p0
        WHERE p.projectid = p0.projectid AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM contractemployee AS c0
            WHERE p0.contractid = c0.contractid AND c0.employeeid = @__employeeId_0) AND (p0.statusid <> 6 OR (p0.statusid IS NULL))))

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

2025-01-31 16:04:23.227 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (106ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid AS "CustomerId", CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"
FROM customer AS c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM project AS p
    WHERE c.customerid = p.customerid AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM projectcontract AS p0
        WHERE p.projectid = p0.projectid AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM contractemployee AS c0
            WHERE p0.contractid = c0.contractid AND c0.employeeid = @__employeeId_0) AND (p0.statusid <> 6 OR (p0.statusid IS NULL))))

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM (
    SELECT t0."Key"
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', t.timesheetdate) AS "Key"
        FROM timesheetdetail AS t
        WHERE t.timesheetid IN (87, 545, 846, 1193) AND (t.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (t.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND date_part('year', t.timesheetdate)::int = @__currentYear_1
    ) AS t0
    GROUP BY t0."Key"
) AS t1
2025-01-31 16:08:15.996 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (85ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT t0."Year", t0."Month", count(DISTINCT date_trunc('day', t0.timesheetdate))::int AS "EntryCount"
FROM (
    SELECT t.timesheetdate, date_part('year', t.timesheetdate)::int AS "Year", date_part('month', t.timesheetdate)::int AS "Month"
    FROM timesheetdetail AS t
    WHERE t.timesheetid IN (87, 545, 846, 1193) AND (t.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (t.isdeleted IS NULL))
) AS t0
GROUP BY t0."Year", t0."Month"
2025-01-31 16:08:16.102 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (98ms) [Parameters=[@__employee_Employeeid_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__currentYear_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT count(*)::int
FROM timesheetdetail AS t
WHERE t.categoryofactivityid = 19 AND (t.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (t.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM timesheetheader AS t0

FROM project AS p
LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p.statusid = s.statusid
LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid
LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid
LEFT JOIN practice AS p1 ON s0.practiceid = p1.practiceid

) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid

    FROM projectcontract AS p2

    FROM projectemployeeassignment AS p3

) AS t0 ON p.projectid = t0.projectid

c.zipcode, s0.subpracticeid AS subpracticeid1, s0.createdby AS createdby3, s0.createddate AS createddate2, s0.isactive AS isactive3, s0.isdeleted AS isdeleted3, s0.lastupdateby AS lastupdateby1, s0.lastupdatedate AS lastupdatedate2, s0.practiceid, s0.statusid AS statusid3, s0.subpracticename, p1.practiceid AS practiceid0, p1.code, p1.createdby AS createdby4, p1.createddate AS createddate3, p1.isactive AS isactive4, p1.isdeleted AS isdeleted4, p1.lastupdateby AS lastupdateby2, p1.lastupdatedate AS lastupdatedate3, p1.practicename, p1.statusid AS statusid4, p2.projecttypeid AS projecttypeid0, p2.createdby AS createdby5, p2.createddate AS createddate4, p2.isactive AS isactive5, p2.isdeleted AS isdeleted5, p2.lastupdateby AS lastupdateby3, p2.lastupdatedate AS lastupdatedate4, p2.projecttypename, p2.statusid AS statusid5
    FROM projectcontract AS p
    LEFT JOIN rmsemployee AS r ON p.deliveryanchorid = r.employeeid
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p.statusid = s.statusid
    LEFT JOIN project AS p0 ON p.projectid = p0.projectid
    LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p0.customerid = c.customerid
    LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p0.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid
    LEFT JOIN practice AS p1 ON s0.practiceid = p1.practiceid
    LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p2 ON p0.projecttypeid = p2.projecttypeid
    WHERE p.contractid = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t

) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid

2025-01-31 16:42:12.012 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (97ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid AS "CustomerId", CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"
FROM customer AS c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM project AS p
    WHERE c.customerid = p.customerid AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM projectcontract AS p0
        WHERE p.projectid = p0.projectid AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM contractemployee AS c0
            WHERE p0.contractid = c0.contractid AND c0.employeeid = @__employeeId_0) AND (p0.statusid <> 6 OR (p0.statusid IS NULL))))

INNER JOIN rmsemployee AS r ON e.employeeid = r.employeeid
LEFT JOIN role AS r0 ON e.roleid = r0.roleid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r1.rolepageid, r1.isbillingpermit, r1.isdeletepermit, r1.isreadpermit, r1.iswritepermit, r1.pageid, r1.pagesequence, r1.roleid, p.pageid AS pageid0, p.actionname, p.controllername, p.createdby, p.createddate, p.icon, p.isactive, p.isdeleted, p.lastupdatedby, p.lastupdateddate, p.moduleid, p.pagename, m.moduleid AS moduleid0, m.createdby AS createdby0, m.createddate AS createddate0, m.icon AS icon0, m.isactive AS isactive0, m.isdeleted AS isdeleted0, m.lastupdatedby AS lastupdatedby0, m.lastupdateddate AS lastupdateddate0, m.modulename
    FROM rolepage AS r1
    LEFT JOIN page AS p ON r1.pageid = p.pageid
    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
WHERE r.userid = @__employeeCode_0
ORDER BY e.employeeroleid, r.employeeid, r0.roleid, t.rolepageid, t.pageid0

    FROM rolepage AS r1
    LEFT JOIN page AS p ON r1.pageid = p.pageid
    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
WHERE r.userid = @__employeeCode_0
ORDER BY e.employeeroleid, r.employeeid, r0.roleid, t.rolepageid, t.pageid0

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"
FROM customer AS c

    SELECT 1
    FROM project AS p
    WHERE c.customerid = p.customerid AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM projectcontract AS p0
        WHERE p.projectid = p0.projectid AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1

    FROM rolepage AS r1

    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
